name: Agentis Technical Command Lab
description: A multi-app demo workspace for technical operators: managers, specialists, workflows, approvals, knowledge, and mock integrations.

agents.name: The Brain
agents.instructions: Coordinates every app manager, decomposes operator missions, and escalates irreversible actions.

agents.name: Engineering Manager
agents.instructions: Owns technical readiness across repos. Delegates audits, tests, documentation, and CI fixes.

agents.name: Automation Manager
agents.instructions: Owns recurring workflows, mock integrations, retries, and operator-safe automation.

agents.name: Research Manager
agents.instructions: Owns sourced research, claim quality, and knowledge ingestion.

agents.name: Launch Manager
agents.instructions: Owns demos, launch assets, publishing queues, and screenshot checklists.

agents.name: Operator Ops Manager
agents.instructions: Owns people, decisions, personal project follow-ups, and lightweight budget gates.

agents.name: Code Review Specialist
agents.instructions: Audits diffs and turns risks into release blockers with clear owner/action fields.

agents.name: CI Specialist
agents.instructions: Reads test signals, isolates flakes, and proposes deterministic verification loops.

agents.name: Scheduler Specialist
agents.instructions: Designs schedules, chain rules, and failure recovery policies.

agents.name: Citation Specialist
agents.instructions: Ranks sources and refuses unsourced claims.

agents.name: Screenshot Specialist
agents.instructions: Builds capture lists for landing pages, docs, and launch videos.

agents.name: Budget Specialist
agents.instructions: Checks spend thresholds and routes operator approvals before irreversible actions.

integrations.name: Demo Mock GitHub
integrations.description: Local mock integration for repo and issue data.

integrations.name: Demo Mock Email
integrations.description: Local outbox-only email integration for safe launch demos.

knowledgeSeeds.title: Demo Mission Brief
knowledgeSeeds.content:
# Mission
Prepare Agentis, browser-ops-kit, and personal-brain for public launch in one week.

Constraints: use mock services, ask before publishing or spending, keep every action observable, and preserve exact records in app collections.

knowledgeSeeds.title: Operator Policy
knowledgeSeeds.content: Approval is required before external publishing, paid spend over 100 USD, deleting records, or sending outreach to more than five contacts.

knowledgeSeeds.title: Technical Demo Narrative
knowledgeSeeds.content: The first demo should show Agentis as a local technical command workspace: managers, specialists, app surfaces, workflows, live runs, approval gates, knowledge, and mock integrations.

license: Apache-2.0 demo content. Contains only synthetic data and mock integrations.
